# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The Maggioli Design System is published as a set of packages under the
`@maggioli-design-system` scope. Security fixes are applied to the latest
released version of each package. Please make sure you are on the latest
version before reporting an issue.

| Package                                | Supported          |
| -------------------------------------- | ------------------ |
| `@maggioli-design-system/magma`        | :white_check_mark: |
| `@maggioli-design-system/styles`       | :white_check_mark: |
| `@maggioli-design-system/design-tokens`| :white_check_mark: |
| `@maggioli-design-system/icons`        | :white_check_mark: |
| `@maggioli-design-system/svg-icons`    | :white_check_mark: |
| `@maggioli-design-system/identity`     | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues,
discussions, or pull requests.

Instead, report them privately using one of the following channels:

- Open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/magma-design-system/magma/security/advisories/new)
  on GitHub (preferred), or
- Email the maintainers at [security_contact].

Please include as much of the following as you can:

- The package and version affected.
- A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof of concept.
- Any known mitigations or workarounds.

You can expect an initial response within 5 business days. We will keep you
informed of the progress toward a fix and may ask for additional information.
Once a fix is released, we are happy to credit you in the advisory unless you
prefer to remain anonymous.
